did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes a traditional computer vision method for hair occlusion assessment in dermoscopy images, utilizing simple linear iterative clustering (SLIC), isotropic nonlinear filtering (INF), automatic thresholding, and morphological operators. It does not employ machine learning, deep learning, or AI-based models.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
